_comment: WASM variant registry. Maps C extension packages to pre-built python.wasm variants. The 'base' variant is rebuilt per-deploy by build-phase2 --mode=app; numpy/pillow are prebuilt variants.

base.description: CPython 3.13 — slim, no C extensions, suitable for deploy

numpy.description: CPython 3.13 + numpy 2.4.2 (multiarray_umath + random + fft statically linked)

pillow.description: CPython 3.13 + Pillow 11.1.0 (_imaging + libjpeg-turbo + libpng + zlib statically linked)

pydantic-core.description: CPython 3.13 + pydantic-core (Rust core compiled to wasm32-wasi)

ujson.description: CPython 3.13 + ujson 5.10.0 (statically linked, with double-conversion C++ deps)
